description: A Gemini-style AI translation mobile app with a dark-first foundation, vibrant pink/purple gradients, and selective glassmorphism. It features 3D visuals, floating UI elements, and a high-end futuristic feel.

button.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FF2E93] to-[#8B5CF6] rounded-full py-4 px-8 items-center justify-center shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(255,46,147,0.3)]
button.icon: w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-white/10 items-center justify-center border border-white/20

card.glass: bg-white/5 rounded-3xl p-5 border border-white/10 overflow-hidden
card.aiHighlight: rounded-3xl p-5 border border-[#FF2E93]/40 bg-gradient-to-br from-[#FF2E93]/10 to-[#8B5CF6]/10

input.standard: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-4 text-white placeholder-gray-400

bottomNav.container: absolute bottom-0 w-full flex-row justify-around items-center bg-[#0A0514]/90 pb-8 pt-4 px-6 border-t border-white/10
bottomNav.floatingMic: w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FF2E93] to-[#8B5CF6] items-center justify-center -top-8 shadow-[0_0_24px_rgba(255,46,147,0.5)] border-4 border-[#0A0514]

Onboarding.layout: Flex-1, center content. Hero background gradient. Big 3D orb image in center. Language flags (Korean, Moroccan Arabic, English, French) orbiting the orb. 'Get Started' full-width button at bottom.

Home.layout: Header with greeting 'Hi, Mahbub!' and Profile Avatar. Large 'Unlock Smart AI' card with gradient background. Grid of 4 quick action glass cards (Text, Camera, Voice, Chat Buddy). Recent History list. Bottom Tab Nav.
features: Floating center mic in Bottom Nav

TextTranslation.layout: Top bar with From/To language selectors (pill shapes) and a swap icon. Large text input area. Output area in a glass card. Bottom tools (copy, speak, fullscreen, upload image).

VoiceTranslation.layout: Full screen dark glass with subtle pink gradient. Huge waveform animation in center. 'Speak Now I'm Listening' prompt. From/To pills at top. Cancel/Done buttons at bottom.

ChatBuddy.layout: Chat interface. 3D Robot Avatar header. Chat bubbles: user (right, glass), bot (left, gradient). Input at bottom with mic and camera icons.

icons.instructions: Use @expo/vector-icons (Ionicons or Feather). Use standard Emojis for flags (e.g., рџ‡°рџ‡·, рџ‡Ірџ‡¦, рџ‡єрџ‡ё, рџ‡«рџ‡·).

animations.orb_orbit: Use React Native Reanimated to orbit language emojis around the center orb on Onboarding.
animations.waveform: Scale and opacity pulsing animations on bars for live voice feedback on Voice screen.
animations.button_press: Scale down to 0.95 on press in for tactile feedback.

instructions_to_main_agent: For the floating bottom nav, ensure the nav container is position:'absolute', bottom:0. The central Mic button should be visually raised by negative margin/top.
Add 'testID' attributes to ALL interactive and key elements (e.g., testID='get-started-button', testID='mic-button', testID='language-selector').
Build a custom Chat UI for the AI Buddy (LingoBot). Use the '3d_robot' image as the bot's avatar.
Default languages should prominently feature Korean, Moroccan Arabic (Darija), English, and French.
Do NOT use placeholder images. Use the provided URLs in 'media'.
